articles.title: AI infrastructure demand keeps data center and chip supply chains in focus
articles.summary: Global news coverage continues to connect artificial intelligence spending with data center capacity, GPU supply, cloud infrastructure, electricity demand, and semiconductor supply chain constraints.

articles.title: Higher yields pressure growth themes despite resilient demand
articles.summary: Market narratives point to Treasury yield volatility and Federal Reserve rate expectations as a source of pressure for long-duration growth themes, even where consumer and enterprise demand remains resilient.
